rationale: The citing paper’s contribution and design are a structural gasoline location-and-pricing model (P-median location, Bertrand pricing, GMM on Singapore station data), while the cited paper is about dynamic pre/postpromotion dips in supermarket scanner data with distributed lead-lag promotion effects. There is no overlap in focal constructs or any provided evidence of direct methodological reuse, and the match is only a single DOI reference with no contextual citation text indicating substantive dependence.
